projects.name: Simplex — Enterprise dbt Platform
projects.metrics: 248 dbt models · 41 Airflow DAGs · Custom Snowflake operators
projects.headline: Built and owned a production dbt platform from scratch
projects.starStory: Built Simplex's entire data transformation layer — 248 dbt models, 41 Airflow DAGs, and custom Snowflake MERGE operators. Owned the full pipeline from raw ingestion to BI-ready marts.

projects.name: Nuvei — Custom dbt Materialization
projects.metrics: Custom dbt materialization for SingleStore · 45 SSIS packages · Trained full team
projects.headline: Built custom dbt materialization for SingleStore — never done before
projects.starStory: SingleStore wasn't supported by dbt. Wrote a custom materialization from scratch, trained the team on it, and migrated 45 SSIS packages to the new pattern.

projects.name: POC — Snowflake vs Databricks Validation
projects.metrics: 12.6M records validated · 99.8% accuracy · Snowflake vs Databricks
projects.headline: Cross-platform data validation at 12.6M records with 99.8% accuracy
projects.starStory: Validated 12.6M records between Snowflake and Databricks for a platform migration decision. Achieved 99.8% row-level accuracy — the remaining 0.2% was explainable edge cases.

projects.name: Verdict AI — Multi-AI Platform
projects.metrics: 76K LOC · 8 AI providers · SSE streaming · Solo build in 3 weeks
projects.headline: 76K line multi-AI platform solo in 3 weeks with 8 providers
projects.starStory: Built a production AI routing platform solo in 3 weeks — 76,000 lines of code, 8 AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, etc.), SSE streaming, real-time routing. Shipped to production.

projects.name: Observability Dashboard
projects.metrics: 784K work items · 200ms load · $0 vs $150K/yr commercial tools
projects.headline: $0 alternative to $150K/yr observability tools — 784K items at 200ms
projects.starStory: Replaced $150K/yr commercial observability tools with a custom dashboard. Handles 784,000 work items with 200ms load time. Saved the company $150K/yr.

projects.name: AI/ML Course Projects
projects.metrics: DistilBERT 98% precision · CNN Explorer 9K LOC · MIMIC-III healthcare ML
projects.headline: DistilBERT 98% precision, CNN Explorer, MIMIC-III healthcare ML
projects.starStory: Built DistilBERT fine-tuned model (98% precision), a 9K LOC CNN Explorer in TensorFlow.js, and healthcare ML on MIMIC-III dataset. Demonstrated ML fundamentals and applied AI.
